testcase.name: test_add_txt_record
testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record>
def test_add_txt_record(self): """add_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" > self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": 654321, "account_id": 1234, "service_id": 14, "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:127: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record> url = '/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name=example.com' data = [{'account_id': 1234, 'customer_name': 'example.com', 'id': 654321, 'service_id': 14, ...}] method = 'GET'
def _register_response(self, url, data=None, method='GET'): """Registers a reply in the requests mock
:param str url: url to register response :param dict data: data to return :param str method: method for which response is registered (default to all) """ resp = {"result": "success", "data": data} > self.session.add_response( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ method, self.client.baseUrl + url, json=resp, ) E AttributeError: 'FuturesSession' object has no attribute 'add_response'
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:105: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate
testcase.failure:
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate>
def test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate(self): """add_txt_record with wrong token should fail""" > self._register_error( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), "not_authorized", "Authorization required", )
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:157: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <certbot_dns_infomaniak.dns_infomaniak_test.APIDomainTest testMethod=test_add_txt_record_fail_to_authenticate> url = '/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name=example.com' code = 'not_authorized', description = 'Authorization required'
def _register_error(self, url, code, description): """Registers an error reply in the requests mock
:param str url: url to register response :param int code: error code :param str description: error description """ resp = {"result": "error", "error": {"code": code, "description": description}} > self.session.add_response( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 'GET', self.client.baseUrl + url, json=resp, ) E AttributeError: 'FuturesSession' object has no attribute 'add_response'
certbot_dns_infomaniak/dns_infomaniak_test.py:119: AttributeError

def test_del_txt_record(self): """del_txt_record with normal params should succeed""" > self._register_response( "/1/product?service_name=domain&customer_name={domain}".format(domain=DOMAIN), data=[ { "id": "654321", "account_id": "1234", "service_id": "14", "service_name": "domain", "customer_name": DOMAIN, } ], )

def _register_response(self, url, data=None, method='GET'): """Registers a reply in the requests mock
:param str url: url to register response :param dict data: data to return :param str method: method for which response is registered (default to all) """ resp = {"result": "success", "data": data} > self.session.add_response( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ method, self.client.baseUrl + url, json=resp, ) E AttributeError: 'FuturesSession' object has no attribute 'add_response'
